command: docker run --privileged --rm devcontainer:base zsh --version && git version && git lfs version && docker buildx version && docker info

commands: nx run devcontainer:publish-build --target base --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:base --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:base-$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .major) --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:base-$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .major).$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .minor) --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:base-$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .major).$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .minor).$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .patch)

nx run devcontainer:publish-build --target node --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:node --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:node-$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .major) --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:node-$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .major).$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .minor) --tags ghcr.io/ebizbase/devcontainer:node-$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .major).$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .minor).$(node scripts/release-version.js images/devcontainer | jq -r .patch)
